description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upper Two zipped compartments with one zipped pocket and a mobile pouch One compartment with a magnetic buttoned closureTwo short handles woven through metallic loopsZipped pocket on the back Two zipped pockets on the front with asymmetric zipped closuresOne insert pocket on the frontMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 33 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 12 cm
